/usr/bin/ar qc lib/libsimple_reactor.a CMakeFiles/simple_reactor_static.dir/src/Buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/simple_reactor_static.dir/src/ThreadPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/simple_reactor_static.dir/src/Epoll.cpp.o CMakeFiles/simple_reactor_static.dir/src/Channel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/simple_reactor_static.dir/src/EventLoop.cpp.o CMakeFiles/simple_reactor_static.dir/src/Acceptor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/simple_reactor_static.dir/src/TcpConnection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/simple_reactor_static.dir/src/EventLoopThread.cpp.o CMakeFiles/simple_reactor_static.dir/src/EventLoopThreadPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/simple_reactor_static.dir/src/TcpServer.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib lib/libsimple_reactor.a
